mapper.select: SELECT sal.*, e.realname as adjust_by_name FROM schedule_adjust_log sal LEFT JOIN employee e ON sal.adjust_by = e.id WHERE sal.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sal.adjust_time DESC
SELECT sal.*, e.realname as adjust_by_name FROM schedule_adjust_log sal LEFT JOIN employee e ON sal.adjust_by = e.id WHERE sal.id = #{id} AND sal.delmark = 0

SELECT sal.*, e.realname as adjust_by_name FROM schedule_adjust_log sal LEFT JOIN employee e ON sal.adjust_by = e.id WHERE sal.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND sal.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sal.adjust_time DESC

SELECT sal.*, e.realname as adjust_by_name FROM schedule_adjust_log sal LEFT JOIN employee e ON sal.adjust_by = e.id WHERE sal.adjust_by = #{adjustBy} AND sal.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sal.adjust_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_adjust_log ( schedule_id, field_name, old_value, new_value, adjust_type, adjust_by, remark, delmark ) VALUES ( #{scheduleId}, #{fieldName}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue}, #{adjustType}, #{adjustBy}, #{remark}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_adjust_log SET delmark = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
